title: erigeron schultzii
intro: Erigeron schultzii, also known as Schultz's fleabane or Schultz's daisy, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erigeron schultzii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Erigeron schultzii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies and skincare products due to its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.
